Drug loading efﬁciency (DLE) was determined according to the following protocol.
Puriﬁed nanospheres were centrifugated at 20,000× g for 20 min. Supernatant was removed
and pellet of nanospheres was dissolved in acetonitrile. The concentration of RhB incorpo-
rated in the nanospheres was determined spectrophotometrically by absorbance at 555 nm
(Specord 250 Plus, Jena Analytik, Jena, Germany). DLE measurement was performed at the
same time point as cells treatment (as described in Section 2.4.2) to evaluate the amount of
